title: cyphocarpa zeyheri
intro: Cyphocarpa zeyheri, also known as the African egg plant or False melon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is a succulent plant that has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyphocarpa zeyheri include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Cyphocarpa zeyheri may be made by infusing the leaves in water or using the plant in traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
